channel.title: Jannis Dietrich
channel.description: CS Student & Developer from Ulm, Germany. Building apps, bots, and web experiences.

item.title: Shoply – Collaborative Shopping App
item.description: A cross-platform mobile app for collaborative grocery shopping with real-time sync, smart categories, and offline support. Published on iOS and Android.

item.title: Shoply Landing Page
item.description: A modern marketing website for the Shoply app featuring interactive 3D phone mockups, smooth scroll animations, and optimized performance.

item.title: StudyApp – Learning Companion
item.description: A mobile learning companion built with React Native and Expo — featuring spaced repetition flashcards, study planning, and progress tracking.

item.title: ResumeMe – Web App
item.description: A web application that helps users create professional resumes with customizable templates, live preview editing, and AI-powered bullet point suggestions.

item.title: FreeAI – AI Discord Bot
item.description: An AI-powered Discord bot bringing language models and image generation to servers — with context memory, rate limiting, and a modular plugin system.

item.title: Tharos – Discord Bot
item.description: A feature-rich Discord bot for server management and entertainment — with moderation tools, XP leveling, music playback, and custom commands.
